about.title: Full-stack software engineer focused on production-ready systems.
body: I am a full-stack software engineer who develops enterprise solutions and end-to-end web and mobile applications. I work across the stack, building frontend experiences in TypeScript and React (including state management and Next.js), implementing backend services with Express (TypeScript), PHP, and Rust, and designing the infrastructure that keeps systems reliable and secure.

I currently work as Lead Fullstack Software Engineer at Manuel S. Enverga University Foundation - Candelaria Inc. I also serve as a Lead Software Engineer on a part-time contractual basis with an international company in Canada, and I lead a freelance group that delivers identity and business solutions for clients worldwide. I coordinate teams, own delivery, and help translate product goals into pragmatic technical solutions.

Lately I have been diving deep into artificial intelligence and cloud infrastructure: experimenting with agentic development workflows, model orchestration, and scalable cloud architectures to expand what I can deliver and to bring AI into production safely and effectively.

items.quote: Franze is one of the most reliable engineers I've worked with. His attention to UI detail is exceptional.
items.name: Alliah Mikaela Revedezo
